duplicate_primary_key.label: Deduplicate Rows
duplicate_primary_key.description: Remove duplicate rows based on the primary key column to ensure data integrity.

duplicate_primary_key.label: Flag Duplicate Rows
duplicate_primary_key.description: Add a boolean audit column to flag duplicate rows for further review before deletion.

invalid_lookup_value.label: Flag Invalid Email Addresses
invalid_lookup_value.description: Add a boolean audit column to flag email addresses that are not in the allowed lookup list, allowing for manual review.

invalid_lookup_value.label: Exclude Invalid Email Addresses from Output
invalid_lookup_value.description: Exclude the email column from the output to prevent invalid values from affecting downstream processes.

custom_rule_violation.label: Flag Outliers for Email Domain
custom_rule_violation.description: Add a boolean audit column to flag email addresses that do not end with @capgemini.com, allowing for manual review.

custom_rule_violation.label: Exclude Email Column from Output
custom_rule_violation.description: Exclude the email column from the output dataset to prevent the use of invalid email addresses.

implausible_age.label: Flag Outliers in Age
implausible_age.description: Add a boolean audit column to flag the age values that are outside the plausible range [0, 150] for manual review.

implausible_age.label: Fill Nulls in Age
implausible_age.description: Fill missing or implausible age values with a default value, such as the median age, after manual review.

date_clumping_jan1.label: Flag Outliers in OrderDate
date_clumping_jan1.description: Add a boolean audit column to flag the outlier values in the OrderDate column that fall on January 1, indicating they may be default or placeholder dates.

date_clumping_jan1.label: Zero to Null for OrderDate
date_clumping_jan1.description: Replace any sentinel or placeholder values in the OrderDate column with NULL to clean the dataset.

weekend_date_anomaly.label: Flag Weekend Dates
weekend_date_anomaly.description: Add a boolean audit column to flag the dates that fall on weekends, allowing for manual review of these records.

weekend_date_anomaly.label: Exclude Weekend Dates from Output
weekend_date_anomaly.description: Exclude the OrderDate column from the output to prevent weekend dates from affecting downstream processes.
